description: Reviewed baseline for production critical service and controller constructor calls after explicit dependency injection migration. Entries are limited to startup/registration boundaries, component-internal composition, test helpers, or documented stateless/demo boundaries; counts must not increase.

entries.reason: HTTP startup composition entrypoint; constructs the shared config service once before delegating to focused startup helpers.
HTTP route binding boundary; constructs host controllers from shared runtime services without creating replacement service graphs.
HTTP startup composition boundary; constructs and shares process-wide runtime services, capability adapters, and scheduler dependencies once.
runtime config revision controller uses the process-wide cachecoord default selected by startup topology.
coordination service internal backend/value constructors; they implement the shared coordination abstraction itself.
coordination service internal backend/value constructors; they implement the shared coordination abstraction itself.
i18n service constructs component-owned runtime-cache revision primitives from injected cachecoord.
job management component-internal scheduler and shell executor construction from explicit jobmgmt dependencies.
kvcache internal backend/provider constructor; does not construct a higher-level runtime service graph.
plugin internal component composition or descriptor construction; does not create host-level service graph outside the plugin facade.
plugin internal component composition or descriptor construction; does not create host-level service graph outside the plugin facade.
plugin internal component composition or descriptor construction; does not create host-level service graph outside the plugin facade.
plugin package test helper constructing an isolated test service graph; production paths do not import this helper.
source-plugin lifecycle payload value constructor; no runtime service graph is created.
plugin runtime cache revision controller and observed revision are component-owned cache coordination primitives.
plugin facade composition boundary; constructs private sub-services once from explicit runtime dependencies passed to plugin.New.
source-plugin host service publication facade; delegates adapter construction to the plugin hostservices component using runtime-owned dependencies.
role access revision controller uses the process-wide cachecoord default selected by startup topology.
